MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory O'Connell, Esq. 415-421-2800 of Dolan Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Sarit Simhayoff-Cohen, Esq. 415-407-4197 for Defendant through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court clarifies the tentative ruling is not contested. Plaintiff requests to vacate trial date and to set a CMC. Defendant objects. The Court denies the request to continue the trial. The Trial date of 1/8/18 in Dept. 206 stands. Parties to meet and confer re: trial date and should file pleading papers to vacate or continue the trial in Dept. 206.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NAMER INC, ZACH NAMER, SARIT NAMER'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT ENTRY.

Defendants Sarit Simhayoff-Cohen (sued as Sarit Namer), Zack Namer, and Namer Inc.'s motion to vacate default entry is granted. Defendants have satisfied the requirements of Code of Civ. Proc. 473.5; and setting aside the default entry comports with the public policy favoring deciding cases on the merits.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AYSC)

Notice And Motion To Vacate Default Entry
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Sarit Smihayoff-Cohen, Esq., Tel. 415.407.4197, for defendant and moving party;
Greg O'Connell, Esq. of Dolan Law Firm PC, Tel. 415.421.2800, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS NAMER INC., ZACH NAMER, SARIT SIMHAYOFF-COHEN'S Motion To Vacate Default Entry is Off calendar. Plaintiff properly objects to the motion being untimely per CCP 1005. Defendant mail-served the motion on November 1, 2017 and did not provide the requisite 16 court day notice plus 5 calendar days for mail service. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.
